raw_consumer_statement: We purchased a refrigerator in XXXX from XXXX XXXX. We paid off the balance within the timeframe at 0 % interest. Suddenly, in XXXX, we began receiving a bill with various charges from {$170.00}, which we were told was a recurring charge for a product we never ordered. After cancelling the card, I then began getting billed $ XXXX {$60.00} for what they said were " XXXX XXXX '' charges. I have NEVER had XXXX XXXX. When I call, they transfer me from Citibank, who handles their credit cards and then tell me it's not them, it's the XXXX XXXX. I ended up paying the charge so it would not end up on my credit report and they cashed the check but didn't credit the account but keep adding more charges on a closed account. Citibank is adding late charges and interest and then claiming it is the XXXX XXXX and there is nothing they can or will do about it. I have literally spent over 8 hours on the phone being transferred to people who tell me there is nothing they can do. Citibank cashed my check for the {$170.00} which is for something we NEVER purchased and is now adding fees but claiming it is not their issue to resolve. I have a bill for {$260.00} when their original fraudulent charge was {$170.00} that I paid. I will not pay anymore to this company and will never shop at XXXX XXXX again
